description: OSHPD: Operating rooms for general surgery shall have a minimum clear floor area of 400 sq ft, excluding fixed or wall-mounted cabinets and built-in shelves.
OSHPD: Cardiac catheterization lab minimum clear floor area 600 sq ft with seismic bracing for all ceiling-mounted equipment.
OSHPD: Single-bed patient room minimum 150 sq ft clear floor area; multi-bed rooms 120 sq ft per bed.
OSHPD: Patient rooms require a minimum 6 ACH total airflow, 2 ACH outside air, per ASHRAE 170 as adopted by California.
citation: California OSHPD SOP / ASHRAE 170-2021 as adopted

description: OSHPD: ICU patient cubicle minimum 200 sq ft clear floor area, with seismic anchorage of all equipment.
OSHPD: Emergency treatment room minimum 120 sq ft clear floor area per treatment space.
OSHPD: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width; cross-corridors and exit corridors serving as egress paths minimum 8 ft.
OSHPD: All new hospital construction must comply with California seismic regulations; all equipment must be anchored per CBC Chapter 16A.
citation: California Building Code Chapter 16A — Essential Services Buildings

description: OSHPD: Inpatient pharmacy with sterile compounding area minimum 400 sq ft, with ISO Class 7 anteroom and ISO Class 5 primary engineering control.
citation: California Board of Pharmacy / OSHPD SOP

description: OSHPD: Operating rooms require minimum 20 ACH total airflow, 4 ACH outside air, HEPA-filtered supply, positive pressure differential.
